import { useTranslation } from "react-i18next"; import React from 'react'; import { FileText, Tag, Wallet, CreditCard } from 'lucide-react'; export const OrderPaymentSummary = React.memo(({ CardComponent, isSellerView, selectedOrder, sellerTotalAmount, onOpenReceipt, resolveEnumLabel, formatCurrency, getPaymentStatusIndicatorClass, getPaymentStatusTextClass }) => { return

{t("payment_summary")}

{selectedOrder.paymentStatus ?
{t("payment_status")}
{resolveEnumLabel('paymentStatuses', selectedOrder.paymentStatus) || selectedOrder.paymentStatus}
: null}
{!isSellerView ?
{t("subtotal")} {formatCurrency(selectedOrder.subtotal || selectedOrder.totalAmount, selectedOrder.currency)}
: null} {!isSellerView && selectedOrder.couponDiscount > 0 ?
{t("discount")} -{formatCurrency(selectedOrder.couponDiscount, selectedOrder.currency)}
: null}
{t("payment_method")}
{selectedOrder.paymentMethod}
{t("total")} {formatCurrency(isSellerView ? sellerTotalAmount : selectedOrder.totalAmount, selectedOrder.currency)}
{selectedOrder.paymentReference && onOpenReceipt ? : null} ; }); OrderPaymentSummary.displayName = 'OrderPaymentSummary';

import { useTranslation } from "react-i18next"; import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from "react"; import { ArrowDownCircle, ArrowUpCircle, ShoppingCart, Wallet, X } from "lucide-react"; import DataPagination from '../../common/components/ui/DataPagination.jsx'; import { PAGE_SIZE_OPTIONS_5_10_20_50 } from '../../common/constants/pagination.js'; import { DEFAULT_CURRENCY_SYMBOL, DEFAULT_PAYMENT_FILTERS, PAYMENT_DIRECTIONS, PAYMENT_TRANSACTION_TYPES, PAYMENT_TYPES } from "../paymentSchema.js"; const PaymentFilterSidebar = ({ isOpen, onClose, filters, onFilterChange, onReset, hasActiveFilters }) => { const { t } = useTranslation(); const [localFilters, setLocalFilters] = useState(filters); useEffect(() => { setLocalFilters(filters); }, [filters]); const handleInputChange = useCallback((field, value) => { setLocalFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, [field]: value })); onFilterChange(field, value); }, [onFilterChange]); const handleReset = useCallback(() => { setLocalFilters(DEFAULT_PAYMENT_FILTERS); onReset(); }, [onReset]); return <> {isOpen &&
}

{t("filters")}

{t("refine_payment_history_with_precision")}

{t("quick_filters")}

{t("seller")}

handleInputChange('seller', e.target.value)} className="w-full pl-8 pr-2 py-2.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl text-xs focus:ring-4 focus:ring-indigo-100 focus:border-indigo-400 focus:bg-white transition-all" />

{t("transaction_type")}

{t("payment_method")}

{t("payment_direction")}

{t("date_range")}

handleInputChange('dateFrom', e.target.value)} className="w-full px-2 py-2.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl text-xs focus:ring-4 focus:ring-indigo-100 focus:border-indigo-400 focus:bg-white transition-all" />
handleInputChange('dateTo', e.target.value)} className="w-full px-2 py-2.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl text-xs focus:ring-4 focus:ring-indigo-100 focus:border-indigo-400 focus:bg-white transition-all" />

{t("amount_range")}

handleInputChange('amountMin', e.target.value)} className="w-full pl-6 pr-2 py-2.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl text-xs focus:ring-4 focus:ring-indigo-100 focus:border-indigo-400 focus:bg-white transition-all" /> {DEFAULT_CURRENCY_SYMBOL}
handleInputChange('amountMax', e.target.value)} className="w-full pl-6 pr-2 py-2.5 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl text-xs focus:ring-4 focus:ring-indigo-100 focus:border-indigo-400 focus:bg-white transition-all" /> {DEFAULT_CURRENCY_SYMBOL}
; }; const PaymentPagination = React.memo(({ currentPage, totalPages, pageSize, totalItems, onPageChange, onPageSizeChange }) => { const startItem = totalItems === 0 ? 0 : currentPage * pageSize + 1; const endItem = Math.min((currentPage + 1) * pageSize, totalItems); return ; }); const PaymentNavigation = ({ showFilters, onCloseFilters, filters, onFilterChange, onResetFilters, hasActiveFilters }) => ; export default PaymentNavigation; export { PaymentPagination };

import { useTranslation } from "react-i18next"; import { formatCurrency } from '../../common/formatters.js'; import PaymentAgreementsSection from './PaymentAgreementsSection.jsx'; import { PAYMENT_TYPES } from '../paymentSchema.js'; import { formatPaymentAmount } from '../utils/formatPaymentAmount.js'; const PaymentPanel = ({ selectedListing, feeConfig, paymentType, onPaymentTypeChange, isProcessingPayment, onPayment, eWallet, agreementsAccepted, acceptedAgreementIds, onAgreementToggle, onRequiredAgreementsChange }) => { const { t } = useTranslation(); return

{t("payment_panel")}

{t("review_the_fee_details_and_choose_a_secu")}

{selectedListing ? <>

{t("chosen_listing")}

{selectedListing.title}

{!feeConfig ?
:
{t("invoice_summary")} {t("listing_fee_breakdown")}
{t("listing_fee")} {formatPaymentAmount(feeConfig.creationFee)}
{t("tax")}{`(${feeConfig.taxPercentage}%)`} {formatPaymentAmount(feeConfig.creationFee * feeConfig.taxPercentage / 100)}
{t("total_due")} {formatPaymentAmount(feeConfig.totalCreationFee)}
}
{/* eWallet Balance Warning */} {paymentType === PAYMENT_TYPES.EWALLET && feeConfig && eWallet &&
{eWallet.balance >= feeConfig.totalCreationFee ?
{t("sufficient_balance_available_for_payment")}
:
{t("insufficient_balance_you_need")}{formatPaymentAmount(feeConfig.totalCreationFee - eWallet.balance)}{t("more")}
}
} {/* Payment Agreements */} {selectedListing &&
}

{t("after_successful_payment_your_listing_wi")}

{t("ssl_secured")}
{t("pci_dss_compliant")}
:

{t("chose_a_listing_to_pay_the_listing_fee")}

}
; }; export default PaymentPanel;
